text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 "We're losing the shit talking war too!" - Tim Dillon 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 “我们也在输掉这场口水战！” - 蒂姆·狄龙 (Tim Dillon) 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 👀 An unknown launcher has reportedly been installed on the Arleigh Burke-class destroyer USS Carl M. Levin, with its purpose still unclear, according to The War Zone. ▪️ The system is visible on the upper deck near the stern section of the ship. ▪️ Its design resembles the White Spike interceptor launcher developed by Zone 5 Technologies. ▪️ The unit is positioned between the port-side torpedo tubes and the Mk 41 vertical launch system, featuring multiple cells and likely a rotating base for targeting. ▪️ However, its appearance does not fully match any known public systems. ▪️ Another possibility is that it could be a launcher for AGM-179 JAGM missiles, for which Lockheed Martin has previously proposed four-cell modules for installation on Arleigh Burke destroyers. ▪️ JAGM missiles, equipped with radar and infrared guidance, are effective against drones and fast attack boats. ▪️ Beyond combat roles, the system may also be used to deploy decoys or drone countermeasures. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 👀 据《战区》(The War Zone) 报道，阿利·伯克级驱逐舰“卡尔·M·莱文”号 (USS Carl M. Levin) 上据称安装了一种不明发射装置，其用途尚不明确。 ▪️ 该系统位于舰尾附近的上层甲板上，清晰可见。 ▪️ 其设计类似于 Zone 5 Technologies 开发的“白刺”(White Spike) 拦截器发射装置。 ▪️ 该装置位于左舷鱼雷发射管和 Mk 41 垂直发射系统之间，具有多个单元，并可能配有用于瞄准的旋转底座。 ▪️ 然而，其外观与任何已知的公开系统并不完全匹配。 ▪️ 另一种可能性是，它可能是 AGM-179 JAGM 导弹的发射装置，洛克希德·马丁公司此前曾提议为阿利·伯克级驱逐舰安装四单元模块。 ▪️ JAGM 导弹配备雷达和红外制导，对无人机和快速攻击艇有效。 ▪️ 除了作战角色外，该系统还可能用于部署诱饵或无人机对抗措施。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hamas statement: Hamas condemns Ben-Gvir’s latest visit to the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound, calling it a “provocative incursion” and accusing Israel of advancing “Judaization” efforts with full government backing. The group says the move violates the site’s sanctity and will not change its status, insisting Al-Aqsa “belongs solely to Muslims.” Hamas urges Palestinians to mobilize at the mosque and calls on Arab and Islamic states, along with the international community, to act against what it describes as ongoing violations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 哈马斯声明：哈马斯谴责本-格维尔 (Ben-Gvir) 最近对阿克萨清真寺大院的访问，称其为“挑衅性入侵”，并指责以色列在政府的全力支持下推进“犹太化”努力。该组织表示，此举侵犯了该地点的神圣性，不会改变其地位，并坚称阿克萨“完全属于穆斯林”。哈马斯敦促巴勒斯坦人在清真寺动员起来，并呼吁阿拉伯和伊斯兰国家以及国际社会采取行动，反对其所称的持续违规行为。推文

text: WarTranslated Seven new Pantsir air defense towers were built around Putin’s Valdai residence, bringing the total to 27, Radio Svoboda reports from satellite imagery. The sites form two rings and construction began March 17, with some towers already equipped. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043305632690823457/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据自由欧洲电台 (Radio Svoboda) 根据卫星图像报道，普京的瓦尔代官邸周围新建了七座新的“铠甲”(Pantsir) 防空塔，总数达到 27 座。这些地点形成了两个环，建设始于 3 月 17 日，部分塔楼已经配备了设备。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043305632690823457/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇷🇺 Putin has reportedly ordered the installation of 7 additional Pantsir-S1 air defense systems around his Valdai residence ▪️ Construction began on March 17, with some towers already fully equipped. ▪️ In total, around 27 air defense systems are now deployed around the residence in a two-layer setup. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇷🇺 据报道，普京已下令在其瓦尔代官邸周围增设 7 套“铠甲-S1”(Pantsir-S1) 防空系统。 ▪️ 建设始于 3 月 17 日，部分塔楼已完全配备设备。 ▪️ 总共有约 27 套防空系统现已部署在官邸周围，呈双层布局。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tucker Carlson on war with Iran: "The biggest mistake President Trump, or any US president, has made in his lifetime." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043303828401905981/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson) 谈与伊朗的战争：“特朗普总统或任何美国总统一生中犯下的最大错误。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043303828401905981/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's internet shutdown has hit day 44. The longest nationwide blackout ever recorded. - NetBlocks tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗的互联网中断已进入第 44 天。这是有记录以来最长的全国性断网。 - NetBlocks 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Footage of a three-story explosives lab destroyed in Tulkarem. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043302971421683952/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军 (IDF)：图尔卡姆 (Tulkarem) 一座三层爆炸物实验室被摧毁的画面。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043302971421683952/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Report from Iran: Iranian soldiers ordered to evacuate and sent a leave. Source tells me: After the ceasefire, soldiers were called back to the barracks and bases for "helping with the reconstruction", yet, today the bases were ordered evacuated and soldiers were sent on leave. #Iran https://twitter.com/hey_itsmyturn/status/2043295620488933802/photo/1 - Shin tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗报告：伊朗士兵被命令撤离并休假。消息人士告诉我：停火后，士兵们被召回军营和基地“协助重建”，然而，今天基地接到撤离命令，士兵们被送去休假。#Iran https://twitter.com/hey_itsmyturn/status/2043295620488933802/photo/1 - Shin 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Iranian lawmaker says Iran will seize and sell hostile ships in the Persian Gulf if the U.S. does not pay war compensation. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043302496425144327/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一名伊朗议员表示，如果美国不支付战争赔偿，伊朗将扣押并出售波斯湾的敌对船只。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043302496425144327/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: Putin holds phone talks with Iran’s president tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 快讯：普京与伊朗总统进行电话会谈 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational…" ⚡ 🇭🇺 More than 54% of Hungarian voters have already cast their ballot at 1pm CEST beating by a large margin turnout of previous years. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利大选投票已经开始，总理维克托·欧尔班 (Viktor Orbán) 在其执政 16 年后，面临挑战者彼得·马贾尔 (Péter Magyar) 的竞争。欧尔班领导执政党青民盟 (Fidesz)，并围绕民族主义政策和对抗性立场建立了他的纲领……” ⚡ 🇭🇺 截至欧洲中部夏令时间下午 1 点，超过 54% 的匈牙利选民已经投票，大幅超过往年的投票率。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Audio of IRGC Navy warning the US ships. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队 (IRGC) 海军警告美国军舰的音频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Iranian IRGC Navy has released footage and radio recordings of a confrontation with a U.S. Navy destroyer (hull number 121) in the Oman Sea near Fujairah port. The Iranian operator warned: “You must alter course and go back to the Indian Ocean immediately. If you don’t obey my order, you will be targeted.” The US vessel responded: “This is Coalition Warship 121, engaged in transit passage in accordance with international law. No challenge is intended to you.” Iran then issued a final warning and later announced that the destroyer retreated. Semi-official Tasnim News Agency described the incident as a “proud scene of U.S. destroyers fleeing.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军发布了在阿曼海富查伊拉港附近与一艘美国海军驱逐舰（舷号 121）对峙的画面和无线电录音。伊朗操作员警告说：“你们必须立即改变航向，返回印度洋。如果不服从我的命令，你们将成为目标。”美国舰艇回应称：“这是联军军舰 121 号，根据国际法进行过境通行。无意对你们进行挑衅。”伊朗随后发出最后警告，并随后宣布该驱逐舰撤退。半官方的塔斯尼姆通讯社 (Tasnim News Agency) 将此次事件描述为“美国驱逐舰逃跑的自豪场景”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 What appears to be a SAM launcher equiped with R-77-1 air-to-air missiles was spotted in Orel, Russia. While the use of R-77 medium-range missiles as a ground launched air defense missile has been explored for a while, this is the first time on system has been seen in an area frequently attacked by Ukrainian drones. The use of air-to-air missiles in a ground launched variant is not exclusive to Russia: NASAMS, IRIS-T, MICA-VL do the same. The use of R-77 here is quite surprising, Ukrainian avaiation sources noted a reduction of R-77 attacks in recent months suggesting a stockpile shortage. Maybe the evergrowing Ukrainian drone threat and the traditional air defense system losses this year has forced Russians to redirect the limited stockpile of R-77 for air defense purpose. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 在俄罗斯奥廖尔 (Orel) 发现了一台似乎配备了 R-77-1 空对空导弹的防空导弹发射装置。虽然将 R-77 中程导弹作为地对空防空导弹使用已经探索了一段时间，但这是首次在经常受到乌克兰无人机袭击的地区看到该系统。使用地对空变体的空对空导弹并非俄罗斯独有：NASAMS、IRIS-T、MICA-VL 也是如此。在这里使用 R-77 非常令人惊讶，乌克兰航空消息人士指出，近几个月来 R-77 的袭击有所减少，这表明库存短缺。也许日益增长的乌克兰无人机威胁和今年传统防空系统的损失迫使俄罗斯人将有限的 R-77 库存重新用于防空目的。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Press TV: ↩️ Reply to Press TV: "👉 Press TV Exclusive: US destroyers' Strait of Hormuz transit stunt failed, came close to destruction 🔺The US military’s attempt to sail two destroyers through the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday ended as a failed propaganda stunt timed to coincide with talks…" 🔺 Press TV's investigation found the American attempt to be an extremely high-risk move that could have easily turned into a disaster for the United States and its military. 🔺 The destroyers were only a few minutes away from complete destruction after Iranian cruise missiles locked onto the vessel and attack drones were deployed. 🔺 When the two destroyers and the accompanying fleet reached the mouth of the Persian Gulf, Iran's cruise missiles locked onto them, and the destroyers were given only 30-minutes to turn back. The vessels immediately retreated. 🔺 They had attempted to use electronic warfare tactics, including turning off its position reporting system, in a bid to deceive the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) naval forces. 🔺 By spoofing their identity, they sought to present themselves as commercial vessels belonging to Oman, purportedly engaged in coastal transit in the southern part of the Sea of Oman, the investigation revealed. 🔺 The destroyers also chose a route very close to the coast and through shallow waters, taking a high risk to pass through this route and enter the Persian Gulf through concealment, deception, expecting that Iranian forces might be negligent during the ceasefire 🔺 However, the IRGC naval forces, while patrolling around Fujairah, had already detected the deception and taken swift action. 🔺 The USS Frank Peterson first tried to continue on its course but immediately realized that cruise missile radars had locked onto it, and it was stopped by IRGC vessels. 🔺 Simultaneously, IRGC drones flew over the two destroyers. The USS Peterson then received a notification on international channel 16 that it must either turn back and leave the area within thirty minutes or it would become a target of the Iranian Armed Forces. 🔺 As the destroyer insisted on continuing, a final warning was issued to it, such that the destroyer was only minutes away from being destroyed 🔺 According to the investigation, the conversation between the IRGC naval forces operator and the American destroyers indicates their full compliance with the IRGC's warning 🔺 The investigation further revealed that the failed operation was specifically designed to exploit the ceasefire in order to test the readiness of Iran's naval forces. 🔺 It also sought to have an impact on the negotiators in Islamabad, where high-stakes Iran-US talks were underway under Pakistani mediation. 🔺 According to the findings of the investigation, the operation of the two US destroyers failed and was defeated in achieving both goals. 🔺 Support helicopters were also flying above destroyers. Simultaneously with the warning to these two destroyers, all vessels in the area were warned to stay at least 10 miles away from them so that if they were targeted by the IRGC, the surrounding vessels would not be harmed. 🔺 The investigation also noted that the high-risk and botched US operation was the result of the expulsion of top military generals from the army on the orders of War Secretary Pete Hegseth in recent days. @PressTV
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Press TV：↩️ 回复 Press TV：“👉 Press TV 独家：美国驱逐舰霍尔木兹海峡过境特技失败，险些被摧毁 🔺美国军方周六试图派遣两艘驱逐舰穿过霍尔木兹海峡的尝试，以一场配合谈判的失败宣传特技告终……” 🔺 Press TV 的调查发现，美国的尝试是一次极高风险的举动，很容易演变成美国及其军队的灾难。 🔺 在伊朗巡航导弹锁定舰艇并部署攻击无人机后，驱逐舰距离彻底摧毁仅几分钟之遥。 🔺 当两艘驱逐舰及随行舰队到达波斯湾口时，伊朗的巡航导弹锁定了它们，驱逐舰只被给予 30 分钟的时间掉头。舰艇立即撤退。 🔺 他们试图使用电子战策略，包括关闭其位置报告系统，以试图欺骗伊斯兰革命卫队 (IRGC) 海军部队。 🔺 调查显示，通过伪造身份，他们试图将自己伪装成属于阿曼的商船，声称在阿曼海南部进行沿海过境。 🔺 驱逐舰还选择了非常靠近海岸和浅水的路线，冒着高风险通过这条路线，并试图通过隐蔽和欺骗进入波斯湾，预计伊朗军队在停火期间可能会疏忽。 🔺 然而，伊斯兰革命卫队海军部队在富查伊拉周围巡逻时，已经发现了这种欺骗行为并采取了迅速行动。 🔺 “弗兰克·彼得森”号 (USS Frank Peterson) 驱逐舰起初试图继续航行，但立即意识到巡航导弹雷达已将其锁定，并被伊斯兰革命卫队舰艇拦截。 🔺 同时，伊斯兰革命卫队的无人机飞越了两艘驱逐舰。随后，“彼得森”号在国际 16 频道收到通知，必须在 30 分钟内掉头离开该地区，否则将成为伊朗武装部队的目标。 🔺 由于该驱逐舰坚持继续航行，对其发出了最后警告，以至于该驱逐舰距离被摧毁仅剩几分钟。 🔺 根据调查，伊斯兰革命卫队海军操作员与美国驱逐舰之间的对话表明他们完全遵守了伊斯兰革命卫队的警告。 🔺 调查进一步显示，这次失败的行动是专门为了利用停火来测试伊朗海军部队的战备状态而设计的。 🔺 它还试图对伊斯兰堡的谈判者产生影响，当时巴基斯坦正在调解高风险的伊美谈判。 🔺 根据调查结果，两艘美国驱逐舰的行动失败，未能实现这两个目标。 🔺 支援直升机也在驱逐舰上方飞行。在向这两艘驱逐舰发出警告的同时，该地区的所有船只都被警告至少保持 10 英里的距离，以便如果它们被伊斯兰革命卫队锁定，周围的船只不会受到伤害。 🔺 调查还指出，这次高风险且拙劣的美国行动是国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯 (Pete Hegseth) 近日下令将高级军事将领从军队中驱逐的结果。@PressTV

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Press TV: 👉 Press TV Exclusive: US destroyers' Strait of Hormuz transit stunt failed, came close to destruction 🔺 The US military’s attempt to sail two destroyers through the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday ended as a failed propaganda stunt timed to coincide with talks in Islamabad, a Press TV investigation has found. 🔺 The investigation, based on information provided by highly placed military-security sources, reveals that the US Navy destroyers came within minutes of complete destruction after attempting a high-risk passage through the Strait of Hormuz in a failed propaganda operation 🔺 The USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) and USS Frank E. Peterson (DDG 121), both Arleigh Burke-class destroyers, attempted to transit the strategic waterway but were intercepted and forced to retreat by Iranian naval forces. 🔺 According to the investigation, the American destroyers and their accompanying frigates did not succeed in passing through the strategic waterway that remains closed for US vessels. @PressTV
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Press TV：👉 Press TV 独家：美国驱逐舰霍尔木兹海峡过境特技失败，险些被摧毁 🔺 美国军方周六试图派遣两艘驱逐舰穿过霍尔木兹海峡的尝试，以一场配合伊斯兰堡谈判的失败宣传特技告终，Press TV 的一项调查发现。 🔺 该调查基于高级军事安全消息来源提供的信息，揭示了美国海军驱逐舰在试图通过霍尔木兹海峡进行高风险航行的一场失败宣传行动中，距离彻底摧毁仅几分钟之遥。 🔺 “迈克尔·墨菲”号 (USS Michael Murphy, DDG 112) 和“弗兰克·E·彼得森”号 (USS Frank E. Peterson, DDG 121) 两艘阿利·伯克级驱逐舰试图通过该战略水道，但被伊朗海军部队拦截并被迫撤退。 🔺 根据调查，美国驱逐舰及其随行护卫舰未能成功通过该对美国舰艇仍然关闭的战略水道。@PressTV

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Press TV's investigation found the American attempt to be an extremely high-risk move that could have easily turned into a disaster for the United States and its military. — The destroyers were only a few minutes away from complete destruction after Iranian cruise missiles locked onto the vessel and attack drones were deployed. — When the two destroyers and the accompanying fleet reached the mouth of the Persian Gulf, Iran's cruise missiles locked onto them, and the destroyers were given only 30-minutes to turn back. The vessels immediately retreated. — They had attempted to use electronic warfare tactics, including turning off its position reporting system, in a bid to deceive the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) naval forces. — By spoofing their identity, they sought to present themselves as commercial vessels belonging to Oman, purportedly engaged in coastal transit in the southern part of the Sea of Oman, the investigation revealed. — The destroyers also chose a route very close to the coast and through shallow waters, taking a high risk to pass through this route and enter the Persian Gulf through concealment, deception, expecting that Iranian forces might be negligent during the ceasefire — However, the IRGC naval forces, while patrolling around Fujairah, had already detected the deception and taken swift action. — The USS Frank Peterson first tried to continue on its course but immediately realized that cruise missile radars had locked onto it, and it was stopped by IRGC vessels. — Simultaneously, IRGC drones flew over the two destroyers. The USS Peterson then received a notification on international channel 16 that it must either turn back and leave the area within thirty minutes or it would become a target of the Iranian Armed Forces. — As the destroyer insisted on continuing, a final warning was issued to it, such that the destroyer was only minutes away from being destroyed — According to the investigation, the conversation between the IRGC naval forces operator and the American destroyers indicates their full compliance with the IRGC's warning — The investigation further revealed that the failed operation was specifically designed to exploit the ceasefire in order to test the readiness of Iran's naval forces. — It also sought to have an impact on the negotiators in Islamabad, where high-stakes Iran-US talks were underway under Pakistani mediation. — According to the findings of the investigation, the operation of the two US destroyers failed and was defeated in achieving both goals. — Support helicopters were also flying above destroyers. Simultaneously with the warning to these two destroyers, all vessels in the area were warned to stay at least 10 miles away from them so that if they were targeted by the IRGC, the surrounding vessels would not be harmed. — The investigation also noted that the high-risk and botched US operation was the result of the expulsion of top military generals from the army on the orders of War Secretary Pete Hegseth in recent days.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Press TV 的调查发现，美国的尝试是一次极高风险的举动，很容易演变成美国及其军队的灾难。 — 在伊朗巡航导弹锁定舰艇并部署攻击无人机后，驱逐舰距离彻底摧毁仅几分钟之遥。 — 当两艘驱逐舰及随行舰队到达波斯湾口时，伊朗的巡航导弹锁定了它们，驱逐舰只被给予 30 分钟的时间掉头。舰艇立即撤退。 — 他们试图使用电子战策略，包括关闭其位置报告系统，以试图欺骗伊斯兰革命卫队 (IRGC) 海军部队。 — 调查显示，通过伪造身份，他们试图将自己伪装成属于阿曼的商船，声称在阿曼海南部进行沿海过境。 — 驱逐舰还选择了非常靠近海岸和浅水的路线，冒着高风险通过这条路线，并试图通过隐蔽和欺骗进入波斯湾，预计伊朗军队在停火期间可能会疏忽。 — 然而，伊斯兰革命卫队海军部队在富查伊拉周围巡逻时，已经发现了这种欺骗行为并采取了迅速行动。 — “弗兰克·彼得森”号 (USS Frank Peterson) 驱逐舰起初试图继续航行，但立即意识到巡航导弹雷达已将其锁定，并被伊斯兰革命卫队舰艇拦截。 — 同时，伊斯兰革命卫队的无人机飞越了两艘驱逐舰。随后，“彼得森”号在国际 16 频道收到通知，必须在 30 分钟内掉头离开该地区，否则将成为伊朗武装部队的目标。 — 由于该驱逐舰坚持继续航行，对其发出了最后警告，以至于该驱逐舰距离被摧毁仅剩几分钟。 — 根据调查，伊斯兰革命卫队海军操作员与美国驱逐舰之间的对话表明他们完全遵守了伊斯兰革命卫队的警告。 — 调查进一步显示，这次失败的行动是专门为了利用停火来测试伊朗海军部队的战备状态而设计的。 — 它还试图对伊斯兰堡的谈判者产生影响，当时巴基斯坦正在调解高风险的伊美谈判。 — 根据调查结果，两艘美国驱逐舰的行动失败，未能实现这两个目标。 — 支援直升机也在驱逐舰上方飞行。在向这两艘驱逐舰发出警告的同时，该地区的所有船只都被警告至少保持 10 英里的距离，以便如果它们被伊斯兰革命卫队锁定，周围的船只不会受到伤害。 — 调查还指出，这次高风险且拙劣的美国行动是国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯 (Pete Hegseth) 近日下令将高级军事将领从军队中驱逐的结果。

text: 🇺🇸 Alex Jones and conservative comedian JP Sears did a sketch mocking Donald Trump. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 亚历克斯·琼斯 (Alex Jones) 和保守派喜剧演员 JP·西尔斯 (JP Sears) 演了一出嘲讽唐纳德·特朗普的短剧。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Press TV Exclusive: US destroyers' Strait of Hormuz transit stunt failed, came close to destruction — The US military’s attempt to sail two destroyers through the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday ended as a failed propaganda stunt timed to coincide with talks in Islamabad, a Press TV investigation has found. — The investigation, based on information provided by highly placed military-security sources, reveals that the US Navy destroyers came within minutes of complete destruction after attempting a high-risk passage through the Strait of Hormuz in a failed propaganda operation — The USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) and USS Frank E. Peterson (DDG 121), both Arleigh Burke-class destroyers, attempted to transit the strategic waterway but were intercepted and forced to retreat by Iranian naval forces. — According to the investigation, the American destroyers and their accompanying frigates did not succeed in passing through the strategic waterway that remains closed for US vessels.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Press TV 独家：美国驱逐舰霍尔木兹海峡过境特技失败，险些被摧毁 — 美国军方周六试图派遣两艘驱逐舰穿过霍尔木兹海峡的尝试，以一场配合伊斯兰堡谈判的失败宣传特技告终，Press TV 的一项调查发现。 — 该调查基于高级军事安全消息来源提供的信息，揭示了美国海军驱逐舰在试图通过霍尔木兹海峡进行高风险航行的一场失败宣传行动中，距离彻底摧毁仅几分钟之遥。 — “迈克尔·墨菲”号 (USS Michael Murphy, DDG 112) 和“弗兰克·E·彼得森”号 (USS Frank E. Peterson, DDG 121) 两艘阿利·伯克级驱逐舰试图通过该战略水道，但被伊朗海军部队拦截并被迫撤退。 — 根据调查，美国驱逐舰及其随行护卫舰未能成功通过该对美国舰艇仍然关闭的战略水道。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Press TV: 🔺 Press TV Exclusive: US destroyers' Strait of Hormuz transit stunt failed, came close to destruction The US military’s attempt to sail two destroyers through the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday ended as a failed propaganda stunt timed to coincide with talks in Islamabad, a Press TV investigation has found. @PressTV
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Press TV：🔺 Press TV 独家：美国驱逐舰霍尔木兹海峡过境特技失败，险些被摧毁 美国军方周六试图派遣两艘驱逐舰穿过霍尔木兹海峡的尝试，以一场配合伊斯兰堡谈判的失败宣传特技告终，Press TV 的一项调查发现。@PressTV

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it has killed an alleged Hezbollah fighter who was allegedly involved in the death of Staff Sergeant Touvel Yosef Lifshiz in southern Lebanon last week. During an initial exchange of fire on Tuesday, Lifshiz and one Hezbollah member were killed. Two days later, troops returned to the site, found a second Hezbollah fighter hiding under the rubble and then killed him at close range. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，已击毙一名据称参与了上周在黎巴嫩南部杀害图维尔·约瑟夫·利夫希兹 (Touvel Yosef Lifshiz) 中士的真主党武装人员。在周二的初步交火中，利夫希兹和一名真主党成员丧生。两天后，部队返回现场，发现第二名真主党武装人员躲在瓦砾下，随后在近距离将其击毙。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇷🇺🇮🇷 Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian, according to the Kremlin. Pezeshkian congratulated Putin and Orthodox Christians in Russia on Easter. He also commented on the Iran–U.S. talks held on April 11 in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics…" 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Masoud Pezeshkian thanked Vladimir Putin for Russia’s humanitarian assistance to the Iranian people, as well as for Moscow’s principled stance, including on international platforms, aimed at de-escalating the situation, the Kremlin said. Putin and Pezeshkian also reaffirmed their mutual commitment to further strengthening comprehensive, good-neighborly relations between Russia and Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇷🇺🇮🇷 据克里姆林宫称，弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽希齐扬 (Masoud Pezeshkian) 进行了电话交谈。佩泽希齐扬向普京和俄罗斯的东正教基督徒祝贺复活节。他还评论了 4 月 11 日在伊斯兰堡举行的伊美谈判。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics……” 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫表示，马苏德·佩泽希齐扬感谢弗拉基米尔·普京对伊朗人民的人道主义援助，以及莫斯科在包括国际平台在内的旨在缓和局势方面的原则立场。普京和佩泽希齐扬还重申了他们共同致力于进一步加强俄罗斯与伊朗之间全面、睦邻友好的关系。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Vladimir Putin held a phone call with Masoud Pezeshkian, according to the Kremlin. Pezeshkian congratulated Putin and Orthodox Christians in Russia on Easter. He also commented on the Iran–U.S. talks held on April 11 in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 据克里姆林宫称，弗拉基米尔·普京与马苏德·佩泽希齐扬 (Masoud Pezeshkian) 进行了电话交谈。佩泽希齐扬向普京和俄罗斯的东正教基督徒祝贺复活节。他还评论了 4 月 11 日在伊斯兰堡举行的伊美谈判。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及其周边地区，包括基里亚特什莫纳 (Kiryat Shmona)，响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Channel 15 in Hebrew: The Chief of Staff has directed the Israeli army to an immediate state of alert in preparation for war with Iran. A decision on resuming the bombing has not yet been made.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 希伯来语第 15 频道：参谋长已指示以色列军队进入即时戒备状态，为与伊朗的战争做准备。关于恢复轰炸的决定尚未做出。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ Péter Magyar said record turnout is expected in today’s elections. 📌 “It is crucial that every citizen comes out to vote, and just as important to encourage friends, relatives, and others to do the same.” 📌 “Today, millions of us are writing Hungary’s history together. At every election — for victory! God bless you all, and God bless Hungary!” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ 彼得·马贾尔 (Péter Magyar) 表示，预计今天的大选投票率将创历史新高。 📌 “至关重要的是，每一位公民都要出来投票，同样重要的是鼓励朋友、亲戚和其他人也这样做。” 📌 “今天，我们数以百万计的人正在共同书写匈牙利的历史。在每一次选举中——为了胜利！上帝保佑你们所有人，上帝保佑匈牙利！”与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @JenniferJJacobs : None of the US delegation stayed behind in Pakistan after Iran talks. Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff and the technical team departed Islamabad, officials told CBS News. VP Vance landed at Ramstein Air Base in Germany just before 7 a.m. ET. https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-israel-ceasefire-talks/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @JenniferJJacobs : 伊朗谈判后，没有美国代表团成员留在巴基斯坦。官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻 (CBS News)，贾里德·库什纳 (Jared Kushner)、史蒂夫·威特科夫 (Steve Witkoff) 和技术团队已离开伊斯兰堡。万斯副总统在美国东部时间上午 7 点前降落在德国拉姆施泰因空军基地。https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-israel-ceasefire-talks/ 推文

text: ELINT News RT @Ahmed_Rasheed_R : April 11 (Reuters) - U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems to Iran within the next few weeks, CNN reported late on Friday, citing three people familiar with recent intelligence assessments. #Iran #China #USA tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @Ahmed_Rasheed_R : 4 月 11 日 (路透社) - 美国情报显示，中国准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付新的防空系统，CNN 周五晚间援引三位熟悉近期情报评估的人士的话报道。#Iran #China #USA 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @nikitabier : All aggregators had their payouts reduced to 60% this cycle. We will add another 20% deduction in the next cycle. It became abundantly clear: flooding the timeline with 100 stolen reposts and clickbait everyday crowded-out real creators and hurt new author growth. The next step is to assign a permanent deduction to habitual bait posters who use “ 🚨 BREAKING”on every post. X will never infringe on speech or reach—but we will not compensate for manipulation of the program or our users. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @nikitabier : 本周期所有聚合器的支出减少到 60%。我们将在下一个周期再增加 20% 的扣除。这一点变得非常清楚：每天用 100 条被盗的转发和点击诱饵充斥时间线，挤占了真正的创作者，并伤害了新作者的成长。下一步是对那些在每篇帖子中使用“🚨 突发新闻”的习惯性诱饵发布者进行永久扣除。X 永远不会侵犯言论或触达率——但我们不会为操纵该计划或我们的用户提供补偿。推文

text: 🇿🇦 ⚡️ Elon Musk's Starlink Tantrum: Accuses South Africa of denying Starlink license because he is not BLACK
text_zh: 🇿🇦 ⚡️ 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的星链 (Starlink) 脾气：指责南非拒绝星链许可证，因为他不是黑人

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Resistance Committees in Palestine issued two statements: They condemned the Zionist bombing of a police point at the entrance to Al-Bureij camp as a continuation of fascist war crimes aimed at spreading chaos, holding the US administration fully responsible for the catastrophic situation, and calling on mediators to impose an end to Zionist violations. They also condemned the storming of Al-Aqsa Mosque by extremist minister Ben Gvir as an attempt to impose temporal and spatial division and Judaization, affirming that Al-Aqsa will remain the title of the struggle, calling on Palestinians to flock to the mosque to protect it from Zionist defilement.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 巴勒斯坦抵抗委员会发表了两份声明：他们谴责犹太复国主义者轰炸布雷吉 (Al-Bureij) 营地入口处的警察哨所，称这是旨在散布混乱的法西斯战争罪行的延续，要求美国政府对灾难性局势承担全部责任，并呼吁调解人强制结束犹太复国主义者的违规行为。他们还谴责极端主义部长本-格维尔 (Ben Gvir) 闯入阿克萨清真寺，称这是试图强加时间和空间分割及犹太化，申明阿克萨将永远是斗争的标题，呼吁巴勒斯坦人涌向清真寺，保护它免受犹太复国主义者的玷污。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Both the US and Iranian delegations have left Islamabad in the immediate aftermath of the failed talks. The U.S. delegation’s government aircraft (N471US) departed overnight and has now landed in Paris. Neither side wanted to stay another day, which is why talks continued into the night. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 在谈判失败后，美国和伊朗代表团都立即离开了伊斯兰堡。美国代表团的政府飞机 (N471US) 于夜间起飞，现已降落在巴黎。双方都不想再多待一天，这就是谈判持续到深夜的原因。@wfwitness

text: Kremlin: Territorial disagreements between Russia and Ukraine amount to “just a few kilometers.”
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的领土分歧仅为“几公里”。

text: Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff did not stay in Islamabad. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 贾里德·库什纳 (Jared Kushner) 和史蒂夫·威特科夫 (Steve Witkoff) 没有留在伊斯兰堡。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 The Chaldean Catholic Church has elected Archbishop Emil Nona as its new patriarch. He has chosen the name Mar Paul Nona III. The 58‑year‑old led the Chaldean Archdiocese of Mosul before the rise of ISIS in 2014, and later served as head of the diocese of Sydney, Australia. His election follows the resignation of Cardinal Louis Raphael Sako. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 加尔底亚礼天主教会 (Chaldean Catholic Church) 选举埃米尔·诺纳 (Emil Nona) 大主教为新任宗主教。他选择了马尔·保罗·诺纳三世 (Mar Paul Nona III) 这个名字。这位 58 岁的主教在 2014 年 ISIS 崛起前领导了摩苏尔的加尔底亚礼总教区，后来担任澳大利亚悉尼教区负责人。他的当选是在路易斯·拉斐尔·萨科 (Louis Raphael Sako) 枢机主教辞职后进行的。@wfwitness

text: The Israeli army is on immediate alert over the possibility of a return to war with Iran. Source: ynet
text_zh: 以色列军队因可能重返与伊朗的战争而处于即时戒备状态。来源：ynet

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed a series of attacks on Sunday in response to alleged Israeli ceasefire violations. Targets included a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Yaron with drones at 07:10, two barrages on Israeli vehicles and troops in Khiam at 05:15 and 05:30, a command vehicle in Taybeh with a drone at 09:45, the Kiryat Shmona barracks with drones at 11:10, an Israeli military gathering at Tel Hamams south of Khiam with rockets at 13:00, the battalion command headquarters in Beit Hillel with rockets at 13:30, and multiple gatherings near Shmaran hill in Bint Jbeil with rocket barrages at 07:30 and 09:30. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党周日声称发动了一系列袭击，以回应据称以色列违反停火协议的行为。目标包括：07:10 用无人机袭击亚伦 (Yaron) 的以色列士兵聚集点；05:15 和 05:30 对希亚姆 (Khiam) 的以色列车辆和部队进行两次弹幕射击；09:45 用无人机袭击泰贝 (Taybeh) 的指挥车；11:10 用无人机袭击基里亚特什莫纳 (Kiryat Shmona) 军营；13:00 用火箭弹袭击希亚姆以南泰尔哈马姆斯 (Tel Hamams) 的以色列军事聚集点；13:30 用火箭弹袭击拜特希勒尔 (Beit Hillel) 的营指挥部；以及 07:30 和 09:30 用火箭弹袭击宾特朱拜勒 (Bint Jbeil) 什马兰 (Shmaran) 山附近的多处聚集点。@wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: All American presidents since 1963 have done substantially what Israel wanted us to do, and now it is really hurting us. The problem is not simply Trump; the problem is the mechanism of control that allows a country of 9 million to control a country of 365 million. What is that mechanism? I am not sure I know the answer. We need to find out.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson)：自 1963 年以来的所有美国总统基本上都做了以色列希望我们做的事，现在这真的伤害了我们。问题不仅仅是特朗普；问题在于允许一个 900 万人口的国家控制一个 3.65 亿人口的国家的控制机制。那个机制是什么？我不确定我知道答案。我们需要找出答案。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan: A Syrian security official stated that the foiling of a Hezbollah‑linked cell that allegedly planned to target a Jewish figure in Damascus shows the government’s commitment to protecting the Jewish community. The official added that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Hezbollah denied “false and fabricated” allegations by the Syrian interior ministry linking the group to a cell planning to assassinate a religious figure in Syria. The group reaffirmed it has no activity, ties or presence on Syrian territory, and called on Syrian authorities to verify information before making accusations, especially as intelligence agencies seek to stir tension between Lebanon and Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan：一名叙利亚安全官员表示，挫败了一个据称计划在大马士革针对一名犹太人物的真主党相关小组，显示了政府保护犹太社区的承诺。该官员补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 真主党否认了叙利亚内政部关于将该组织与一个计划在叙利亚暗杀宗教人物的小组联系起来的“虚假和捏造”指控。该组织重申其在叙利亚领土上没有任何活动、联系或存在，并呼吁叙利亚当局在做出指控前核实信息，特别是在情报机构寻求挑起黎巴嫩和叙利亚之间紧张关系的情况下。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has urged Iran and the United States to “find a way through” after talks in Pakistan ended without a deal. Downing Street said Starmer, in a conversation with the Sultan of Oman, stressed that a continuation of the ceasefire is “vital” and that all parties must avoid further escalation. Health Secretary Wes Streeting called the failed talks “disappointing” and defended Britain’s decision not to join the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国首相基尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 在巴基斯坦的谈判无果而终后，敦促伊朗和美国“找到解决办法”。唐宁街表示，斯塔默在与阿曼苏丹的谈话中强调，停火的延续是“至关重要的”，所有各方必须避免进一步升级。卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷 (Wes Streeting) 称谈判失败“令人失望”，并为英国不加入冲突的决定进行了辩护。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Two U.S. warships entered the Strait of Hormuz yesterday but turned back after an Iranian drone appeared overhead. This was reported by The New York Times, citing sources familiar with the operation. The ships were expected to demonstrate that the passage was secure—potentially the first step toward a mine-clearing mission. Instead, they withdrew after an Iranian reconnaissance drone showed up. The drone was reportedly shot down. According to sources, the two U.S. Navy vessels moved out of the Gulf of Oman, entered the strait, and then reversed course. While U.S. officials said the drone posed no direct threat, the Navy chose not to proceed under active Iranian surveillance. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 两艘美国军舰昨天进入霍尔木兹海峡，但在伊朗无人机出现在头顶后掉头。据《纽约时报》援引熟悉该行动的消息人士报道。这些舰艇本应证明航道是安全的——这可能是迈向扫雷任务的第一步。相反，在伊朗侦察无人机出现后，它们撤退了。据报道，该无人机被击落。据消息人士称，两艘美国海军舰艇驶出阿曼湾，进入海峡，然后掉头。虽然美国官员表示无人机没有构成直接威胁，但海军选择不在伊朗的积极监视下继续前进。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Tucker Carlson: I don’t think Keir Starmer makes any calls about anything. Keir Starmer is as enslaved as Donald Trump is.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson)：我不认为基尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 对任何事情做过任何决定。基尔·斯塔默和唐纳德·特朗普一样被奴役。

text: Tucker Carlson: The single biggest mistake Trump, or any American president has made in my lifetime, is going to war with Iran to change the regime.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson)：特朗普或任何美国总统在我有生之年犯下的最大错误，就是为了政权更迭而与伊朗开战。

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: I feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He is not free in this moment. Trump announced a ceasefire with relief, and then the ceasefire ended in 2 hours because Israel intentionally violated the terms by attacking Beirut.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森 (Tucker Carlson) 谈特朗普：我为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他此刻并不自由。特朗普宣布停火并感到宽慰，然后停火在 2 小时后结束，因为以色列通过袭击贝鲁特故意违反了条款。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Following the collapse of US‑Iran talks, the Israeli Chief of Staff has placed the Israeli military on immediate readiness for a return to war with Iran. The Intelligence Directorate is accelerating target building. No decision on military action has been made yet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在美伊谈判破裂后，以色列参谋长已使以色列军队处于重返与伊朗战争的即时戒备状态。情报局正在加速目标构建。目前尚未做出军事行动的决定。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Ahead of Tuesday’s talks between Israeli and Lebanese representatives, the Maronite Patriarch, Beshara Boutros al‑Rai, called for peace in his Easter sermon. “Enough wars, enough attacks, enough turning Lebanon into an arena for settling scores,” he said. “Peace is not imposed by violence or force, but built through dialogue and negotiation. Peace is not born from victory, but from a true will that respects human life and preserves dignity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在周二以色列和黎巴嫩代表举行会谈之前，马龙派宗主教贝沙拉·布特罗斯·拉伊 (Beshara Boutros al-Rai) 在复活节布道中呼吁和平。“战争够了，袭击够了，把黎巴嫩变成清算账目的竞技场够了，”他说。“和平不是通过暴力或武力强加的，而是通过对话和谈判建立的。和平不是诞生于胜利，而是诞生于尊重生命和维护尊严的真正意志。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed : Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki. His State of Law bloc boycotted the presidential vote alongside the Kurdistan Democratic Party. The constitution allows 15 days to name a prime minister. Some factions are pushing for a second term for the incumbent Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani. Maliki’s chances are weakening; a new candidate may be chosen by majority vote even if he boycotts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪 (Nizar Amidi) 总统当选后，伊拉克的政治舞台因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架 (Coordination Framework) 严重分裂，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基 (Nouri al-Maliki) 的势头日益高涨。他的法治联盟 (State of Law bloc) 与库尔德斯坦民主党 (Kurdistan Democratic Party) 一起抵制了总统投票。宪法允许 15 天时间提名总理。一些派系正在推动现任总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼 (Mohammed Shia al-Sudani) 连任。马利基的机会正在减弱；即使他抵制，也可能通过多数票选出新候选人。@wfwitness
